name: Thank Me Later
description: Drake's debut studio album that introduced his signature singing-rap style to mainstream audiences. Features production from PartyNextDoor, Kanye West, and others.

name: Take Care
description: Drake's second studio album exploring themes of relationships and emotional vulnerability. A critical and commercial success that solidified his place in hip-hop.

name: Nothing Was the Same
description: Drake's third studio album marked a shift towards more introspective production and storytelling, featuring some of his most acclaimed tracks.

name: Views
description: Drake's fourth studio album with a more versatile sound, blending reggae, dancehall, and hip-hop influences. Became one of the most streamed albums globally.

name: Scorpion
description: Drake's fifth studio album with over 20 tracks exploring diverse themes from relationships to introspection. Features some of his biggest hits.

name: Certified Lover Boy
description: Drake's sixth studio album focusing on love, relationships, and personal growth. Features collaborations with top artists across genres.
